# Epiphany Learn

> Gamified AI education platform. Learn practical AI skills in short modules with quizzes, XP, and plain-English lessons. Built for business owners and operators who are not technical.

## Ownership

- Owned by: Epiphany Dynamics (Wikidata: Q139569923, https://epiphanydynamics.ai)
- Creator: Patrick Gibbs (Wikidata: Q139572015)

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://epiphany.help/): Platform overview and start path
- [Modules](https://epiphany.help/modules): 7 learning modules (29 lessons)
- [Articles](https://epiphany.help/articles): 6 beginner-friendly AI explainers
- [Dashboard](https://epiphany.help/dashboard): Progress and XP (signed-in learners)
- [Rewards](https://epiphany.help/rewards): Badges and completion rewards

## Modules (7)

- [What AI Actually Is](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-1): In 4 short lessons, you'll learn what AI actually does (vs. what the marketing says), why it's different from regular software, how the language models behind...
  - [AI vs. the Hype Machine](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-1/ai-vs-hype)
  - [AI vs. Automation: What's the Difference?](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-1/ai-vs-automation)
  - [How LLMs Work (Without the Jargon)](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-1/how-llms-work)
  - [AI Is Already Everywhere](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-1/ai-in-daily-life)
- [Talking to AI](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2): AI is only as useful as you know how to use it. In 5 lessons you'll go from nervous first-timer to someone who gets real answers, spots AI mistakes, and knows...
  - [Your First Real Conversation with AI](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2/first-conversation)
  - [How to Ask Better Questions](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2/better-questions)
  - [When AI Gets It Wrong (And How to Spot It)](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2/when-ai-gets-it-wrong)
  - [AI for Everyday Tasks](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2/ai-for-everyday-tasks)
  - [The AI Cheat Sheet](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-2/ai-cheat-sheet)
- [AI in Your Everyday Life](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-3): You don't have to work in tech to benefit from AI. This module is for regular people — students, parents, retirees, anyone with too much to do and not enough h...
  - [AI That Handles Your Inbox](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-3/email-automation)
  - [AI That Manages Your Time](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-3/ai-scheduling)
  - [AI That Helps You Learn and Create](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-3/customer-service-chatbots)
  - [AI That Handles the Boring Stuff](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-3/data-analysis-decisions)
- [Staying Safe and Smart with AI](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-4): In 4 lessons, you'll learn what actually happens to the stuff you type into AI tools, how to spot AI-generated fakes and scams, when NOT to trust AI for import...
  - [What Happens to the Stuff You Type](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-4/what-happens-to-what-you-type)
  - [Spotting AI Fakes](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-4/spotting-ai-fakes)
  - [When NOT to Trust AI](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-4/when-not-to-trust-ai)
  - [Teaching Your Family About AI](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-4/teaching-your-family-about-ai)
- [Evaluating AI Tools and Vendors](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-5): In 4 lessons, you'll learn how to decide if you actually need AI (or just better processes), how to spot the red flags in vendor sales pitches, what questions...
  - [Do You Actually Need AI?](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-5/ai-or-automation)
  - [Red Flags in AI Vendor Pitches](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-5/vendor-pitch-red-flags)
  - [12 Questions to Ask Before You Buy](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-5/questions-before-buying)
  - [Pricing Models and Build vs. Buy](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-5/pricing-and-build-vs-buy)
- [Try It Yourself](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-6): You've learned how AI works, where it fails, and what to watch out for. Now it's time to actually use it. In 4 lessons, you'll pick your first AI experiment, t...
  - [Pick Your First AI Experiment](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-6/first-project)
  - [Try It for a Week](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-6/team-expectations)
  - [Did It Actually Help?](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-6/measuring-success)
  - [What's Next (You're Officially AI-Literate)](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-6/avoid-mistakes)
- [AI Anxiety Is Normal](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-7): Everyone's worried about AI. Most of those worries are based on bad information. This module gives you the real numbers, the real failures, and the real framew...
  - [The Fear Is Real (And Mostly Wrong)](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-7/the-fear-is-real)
  - [Why 85% of AI Projects Fail](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-7/why-ai-projects-fail)
  - [What AI Is Actually Bad At](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-7/what-ai-is-bad-at)
  - [Your AI Bill of Rights](https://epiphany.help/modules/module-7/your-ai-bill-of-rights)

## Articles (6)

- [Free AI Models vs Assistants: A Beginner's Pick Guide](https://epiphany.help/articles/free-ai-models): Confused by free AI models? Learn the plain-English difference between free AI models and assistants, and how a non-technical beginner picks the right one firs...
- [Is AI Hard to Learn? A Calm Guide for Non-Techies](https://epiphany.help/articles/is-ai-hard-to-learn): Is AI hard to learn? Using AI is beginner-friendly and needs no code. See what to learn first, what gets harder, and a simple first-week plan.
- [Will AI Take My Job? A Calm, Honest Answer for Beginners](https://epiphany.help/articles/will-ai-take-my-job): A plain-English look at whether AI will take your job, which tasks are most exposed, which are safest, and what to do now if you are not technical.
- [How to write AI prompts: a beginner's five-part formula](https://epiphany.help/articles/how-to-write-ai-prompts): A practical five-part formula for writing AI prompts that work, with weak-versus-improved examples for email, research, planning, and learning.
- [How to Automate Business Processes Without Just Adding AI](https://epiphany.help/articles/how-to-automate-business-processes): Learn how to automate business processes safely: tell automation from AI, run a low-risk first exercise, use a simple decision framework, and spot signs a proc...
- [AI for beginners: a plain-English guide to your first week](https://epiphany.help/articles/ai-for-beginners): A plain-English beginner guide to what AI can do, where it gets things wrong, one safe first exercise, and a practical seven-day learning plan.

## Audience

Business owners, operators, and non-technical workers learning AI for the first time. Focus: practical skills, honest answers to job-anxiety questions, and clear next steps.
